2015-T2-P1-S21.trunk: S+V+O(compare A with B)：Orin Kerr … compares the explosion … of digital information in the 21st century with the establishment of automobile use … in the 20th（克尔把21世纪数字信息的爆炸 与 20世纪汽车的普及相类比）
structure: 主句：Orin Kerr … compares the explosion and accessibility of digital information in the 21st century with the establishment of automobile use as a virtual necessity of life in the 20th
├ 同位语〔说明 Orin Kerr〕：a law professor
└ compare A with B：A=21世纪数字信息的爆炸与可得性；B=20世纪汽车成为生活必需
冒号后（对照，两分句分号并列）：
├ 分句①：The justices had to specify novel rules for the new personal domain of the passenger car then
└ 分句②(;)：they must sort out how the Fourth Amendment applies to digital information now
└ 宾语从句(how)：how the Fourth Amendment applies to digital information
2015-T2-P1-S21.logic: 主句 compare A(21世纪数字信息) with B(20世纪汽车)；冒号引出对照（then 当年 vs now 如今，两分句分号并列）；how… 宾语从句。
notes: compare A with B：把 A 与 B 类比；a law professor 是 Orin Kerr 的同位语。
冒号后两分句（分号并列）形成 then(当年汽车) vs now(如今数字信息) 的对照。
sort out how…：how 引导宾语从句（厘清第四修正案如何适用于数字信息）。

2015-T2-P1-S7.trunk: S+V+by doing：They should start by discarding California's lame argument …（他们应先摒弃加州那个站不住脚的论点）
structure: 主句：They should start by discarding California's lame argument …
├ 方式状语(by + V-ing)：by discarding California's lame argument
└ 同位语从句〔that，说明 argument〕：that exploring the contents of a smartphone … is similar to … going through a suspect's purse
├ 动名词作主语：exploring the contents of a smartphone
└ 破折号插入（smartphone 的同位语）：a vast storehouse of digital information
2015-T2-P1-S7.logic: 主句 start by discarding the argument；that 同位语从句说明 argument，其主语是动名词 exploring…，谓语 is similar to going through…；破折号插入 smartphone 的同位说明。
notes: argument that…：that 同位语从句说明 argument（不是定语从句）。
从句主语是动名词 exploring the contents of a smartphone，谓语 is similar to going through…（A is similar to B）。
破折号夹的 a vast storehouse of digital information 是 smartphone 的同位语；say 插入（比如说）。

2015-T2-P1-S17.trunk: 并列双分句(and)：① They could still invalidate … protections ② they could take reasonable measures to ensure …
structure: 分句①：They could still invalidate Fourth Amendment protections when facing severe, urgent circumstances
└ 时间状语(when + 现在分词)：when facing severe, urgent circumstances
并列(and)分句②：they could take reasonable measures to ensure that phone data are not erased or altered while waiting for a warrant
├ 不定式作目的：to ensure that …
├ 宾语从句(that)：that phone data are not erased or altered
└ 时间状语(while + V-ing)：while waiting for a warrant
2015-T2-P1-S17.logic: and 连接两分句；分句① when facing…（现在分词时间状语）；分句② take measures to ensure that…（目的 + 宾语从句），while waiting…（时间状语）。
notes: when facing… / while waiting…：连词 + 现在分词（省略与主句相同的主语）作时间状语。
to ensure that…：不定式作目的；that 引导 ensure 的宾语从句。
phone data are not erased or altered：被动并列（数据不被删除或篡改）。
